summary: Iteration 28: Bug fix verified - Professional templates in Resume Optimizer now correctly parse and display HTML/text content. Fixed parseResumeData function to handle plain text format with ALL CAPS section headers (EXPERIENCE, SKILLS, EDUCATION) in addition to HTML format.
passed_tests: Resume Optimizer: Professional template shows parsed content (name, title, summary, experience, skills, education)
Resume Optimizer: Professional Blue template shows parsed content correctly
Resume Optimizer: Professional Minimal template shows parsed content with skills as tags (no bars)
Resume Optimizer: Photo upload section appears when professional template is selected
Resume Optimizer: Template selector shows 'Photo' badge on all 3 professional templates
Resume Optimizer: Text editing mode works correctly with rich text editor
Resume Optimizer: Sections editing mode works correctly with drag & drop interface
Resume Optimizer: Contact info (email, phone, linkedin) parsed and displayed in sidebar
Resume Optimizer: Skills parsed from 'Programming Languages: Python, JavaScript' format
Resume Optimizer: Experience parsed from 'Title | Company | Date' format with bullet points
Resume Optimizer: Education parsed and displayed in sidebar
critical_code_review_comments: parseResumeData function in ProfessionalTemplate.jsx was updated to handle plain text format with ALL CAPS section headers
findSection helper now tries HTML patterns first, then falls back to plain text parsing
Experience parsing improved to handle 'Title | Company | Date' format
Skills parsing improved to handle 'Category: skill1, skill2' format and remove parenthetical levels
seed_data_creation: Used test DOCX file created with python-docx library
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 28 verified the bug fix for Professional templates in Resume Optimizer. The issue was that parseResumeData function only looked for HTML patterns (<h2>, <strong>, <b>) but the Resume Optimizer content is plain text with ALL CAPS section headers. The fix added plain text parsing as a fallback. All 3 professional templates (professional, professional-blue, professional-minimal) now correctly display: (1) Name and title in header, (2) Contact info in left sidebar, (3) Skills with bars or tags, (4) Education in sidebar, (5) Professional Summary, (6) Work Experience with bullet points. Photo upload section appears when professional template is selected.

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: Professional templates showing blank content when analyzing resume in Resume Optimizer
bug_fix_verification.root_cause:
parseResumeData function only parsed HTML format (

Experience

) but Resume Optimizer content is plain text with ALL CAPS headers (EXPERIENCE)
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Updated findSection helper to try HTML patterns first, then fall back to plain text parsing with ALL CAPS header detection
bug_fix_verification.verification_status: PASS - All 3 professional templates now show content correctly

photo_upload.text: Profile Photo - Required for Professional templates
